meta.title: TURB-Lagr Lagrangian tracers
meta.description: One object per tracer particle in a DNS of homogeneous isotropic turbulence (Re_lambda = 2310, 1024^3, triply periodic box of side 2*pi). Each point is a timestep along the particle path; values are six turbulence diagnostics driving the radar glyph. Because the flow is homogeneous and isotropic, the channels are statistically independent of position (max |r| = 0.072 against any spatial axis, effective rank 5/6), so glyph shape encodes flow structure rather than location.
